claims.intent: Phase 1 of PR-87 quality remediation: lock down runGitCommand chain. Replace generic executeGitCommand DI seam with two narrow capabilities (gitShowFileAtSha, gitFetchShallow); validate VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA at trust boundary against /^[0-9a-f]{40}$/; scrub git env to neutralise hostile global/system config. Closes MUST-FIX argv-injection class surfaced by adversarial security review and the last TO_REVIEW Sonar hotspot.
claims.notes: Inherited 2026-04-28T15:00:00Z by Luminous Dancing Quasar (additive identity per PDR-027). Working tree carries refactor + 32 unit tests + 1 e2e test (uncommitted). 4-of-5 reviewers absorbed (code/security/fred/test) under Tidal; this session dispatches deferred architecture-reviewer-wilma (fail-open + shallow-clone reachability under ADR-163 §10), absorbs findings, re-runs gates one-at-a-time, cluster-commits naming the architectural shape, pushes, observes hotspot AZ3D3iflrIk5eL0ceU__ drop, then proceeds to Phase 2 (Cluster A rate-limit type narrowing). Stance: no fallback dispositions.

claims.intent: Practice-prefix env var rename (OAK_AGENT_SEED + dead CLAUDE_SESSION_ID → PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_{CLAUDE,CURSOR,CODEX}); add Claude Code SessionStart hook that writes PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE to $CLAUDE_ENV_FILE and injects identity additionalContext + non-binding /rename suggestion; correct the start-right directive that incorrectly told Claude Code agents to expect CLAUDE_SESSION_ID from env. Cursor live-test and Codex Practice wrapper called out as future work in agent-identity.md.
claims.notes: TDD throughout — CLI tests, Cursor hook tests, new Claude hook tests all green (91/91 in agent-tools). Build, type-check, lint, markdownlint, format, portability:check, subagents:check all clean. End-to-end smoke test of the .mjs shim verified env-file write and hookSpecificOutput stdout for session 22e835. SessionStart hook fires on next Claude Code session start; in-session verification of the env reaching Bash tool calls is deferred to next session open.
